creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
(In reply to Christos Margiolis from comment #3)
Even updated OS a bit.
14.1-STABLE stable/14-n269153-14c22e28e4ee GJA822L amd64

$ mixer -a | grep ^pcm
pcm0:mixer: <Envy24 audio (M Audio Audiophile 2496)> port 0xec00:32,0xe880:16,0xe800:16,0xe480:64 irq 20 on pci5 (play/rec)
pcm1:mixer: <ATI RS690/780 (HDMI)> on hdaa0 (play)
pcm2:mixer: <VIA VT1708S_0 (Rear Analog)> on hdaa1 (play/rec) (default)
pcm3:mixer: <VIA VT1708S_0 (Front Analog)> on hdaa1 (play/rec)
$ mixer 
pcm2:mixer: <VIA VT1708S_0 (Rear Analog)> on hdaa1 (play/rec) (default)
    vol       = 1.00:1.00     pbk
    pcm       = 0.90:0.90     pbk
    mic       = 0.65:0.65     rec src
    rec       = 0.55:0.55     pbk
    igain     = 0.00:0.00     pbk
    ogain     = 0.00:0.00     pbk
